---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement for CMLB
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!--
What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences it? How often?
Concrete user stories help: "As an operator, I want X so that Y."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What other approaches have you thought about? Why are they less suitable?
Listing alternatives helps reviewers evaluate trade-offs.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
- Screenshots, mockups, or examples
- Links to similar features in other projects
- ADR draft if this is a non-trivial architectural change
- Estimated blast radius (which layers does this touch?)
-->
